phrases.intent_en: Do you take cards for trdelník?
phrases.cultural_note: Many smaller food stalls at Czech markets are cash-only, so it's good to have coins and small bills.

phrases.intent_en: Where can I return my punch cup?
phrases.text_local: Kde můžu vrátit kelímek od punče?
phrases.cultural_note: Deposit cups can be returned to any punč stall, not just the one you bought it from.

likely_response.local: Vraťte ho u kteréhokoliv stánku s punčem.
likely_response.translation_en: Return it at any punch stand.

responses.english: Return it at any punch stand.
responses.local: Vraťte ho u kteréhokoliv stánku s punčem.

phrases.cultural_note: The nativity scene (betlém) is often a central feature of Czech Christmas markets, sometimes with live animals.

likely_response.translation_en: In the middle of the square, next to the big tree.

responses.english: In the middle of the square, next to the big tree.
